name: Artifex Mundi S.A.
summary: Artifex Mundi S.A. develops and publishes video games worldwide. It provides approximately 40 game titles for various platforms, including PC, Mac, iPhone, iPad, Android, Windows, Xbox One, and PlayStation. The company is headquartered in Zabrze, Poland. Artifex Mundi S.A. was formerly a subsidiary of ZSK Progres s.c.
